system.description: This skill represents the knowledge a character has about all types of minerals, metals, and earths, which can permit him to identify them and know their properties. With a successful roll, the character could, for example, distinguish a gold coin from a base imitation simply by looking, recognize a fertile parcel of land from an arid one, locate a vein of silver within a mine, know the type of stone extracted from a specific quarry, or even orient himself within the interior of a cave by following the flow of water or air currents.
